title: BankBazaar Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BankBazaar Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BankBazaar Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
